rationale: Review 2 identifies real reuse violations in the diff (includeRight_apply is literally `rfl` and duplicates Mathlib's already-@[simp] lemma; map_tmul/map_to*Hom are pointwise specializations of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.* with `g:=id`; antipode_tmul merely unwraps the private indirection to _root_.TensorProduct.antipode_def; the four `private` general lemmas are usable across TauCeti but hidden). Acting on these yields a materially smaller, correctly-reusing PR. Review 1 finds nothing and would leave the duplication in place.
